product_overview: A web admin panel for the RideOn platform that allows administrators to authenticate, view platform health, manage users, verify driver documents, monitor and resolve SOS alerts, and manage rides and bookings via a responsive sidebar-driven interface.
core_goals: Provide secure admin authentication and role-based access to admin screens.
Present an at-a-glance dashboard with platform health metrics and recent activity.
Enable efficient user management (search, promote/demote admin, ban/unban).
Support document verification workflows for driver approvals (approve/reject).
Monitor and resolve SOS alerts in real time.
Offer ride and booking management including inspection and force-cancellation.
Deliver a responsive global sidebar navigation for desktop and mobile workflows.

features.name: Global Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Responsive admin shell navigation that provides access to dashboard, users, documents, SOS, rides, and bookings with a collapsible drawer on small screens.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click hamburger menu on mobile to open drawer -> Click navigation items to switch pages -> Arrive at /users
Navigate to /users while not authenticated -> See /login

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Authenticate administrators to grant access to protected admin routes and initialize admin session context.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Arrive at /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in invalid email or password -> Submit login form -> See authentication error and remain on /login

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Overview of platform health with stat cards (Total Users, Active Rides, SOS Alerts, Pending Verifications) and recent activity logs to surface important events.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See stat cards for Total Users, Active Rides, SOS Alerts, and Pending Verifications -> Open a recent activity entry to view details -> See activity detail
Navigate to /dashboard -> See loading state -> See error message when stats fail to load

features.name: User Management
features.description: Search and manage registered users including adjusting admin role and banning/unbanning accounts; updates persisted via the users API.
user_flows: Navigate to /users -> Search for users by name/phone -> Open a user entry from results -> Click toggle admin button -> See updated admin status reflected in the list
Navigate to /users -> Search for a non-existent user -> See no results message
Navigate to /users -> Open a user entry -> Click ban/unban button -> See updated ban status reflected in the list
Navigate to /users -> Click toggle admin button and API update fails -> See update failed error and previous status remains

features.name: Document Verification
features.description: Review driver-submitted documents (DL, Vehicle RC) and change verification status to approve or reject with reasons; updates persisted to the user/document records.
user_flows: Navigate to /documents -> See pending document queue with thumbnails -> Open a document review -> Approve document -> See document status updated to Approved
Navigate to /documents -> See pending document queue -> Open a document review -> Reject document with reason -> See document status updated to Rejected and rejection reason displayed
Navigate to /documents -> Attempt to change verification status and API update fails -> See failure notification and document remains in Pending

features.name: SOS Monitoring and Resolution
features.description: Monitor active SOS alerts with contextual information (user location, ride context) and resolve alerts which update the alert state in the system.
user_flows: Navigate to /sos -> View list of SOS alerts -> Open an alert to view details -> Click resolve action -> See alert marked as resolved or removed from active list
Navigate to /sos -> View list of SOS alerts -> Attempt to resolve an alert and API update fails -> See resolve failure message and alert remains active

features.name: Ride Management
features.description: Inspect ongoing and past rides with route, driver and occupancy information and perform administrative actions such as force-cancelling rides when necessary.
user_flows: Navigate to /rides -> See list of rides with route, driver, and seat occupancy -> Open ride details -> Force cancel ride -> See ride status updated to Cancelled
Navigate to /rides -> Open ride details -> Attempt to force cancel and API call fails -> See cancellation failure message and ride remains active

features.name: Bookings Management
features.description: View and manage bookings linked to passengers and rides; inspect booking details and perform status updates for administrative resolution.
user_flows: Navigate to /bookings -> See bookings list with linked passenger and ride context -> Open a booking to view details -> Update booking status -> See booking status updated in the list
Navigate to /bookings -> Search or filter bookings and find no matches -> See no results message
Navigate to /bookings -> Attempt to update booking status and API update fails -> See update failure message and booking status remains unchanged

routes.description: User management table with ban/unban and admin toggle
List of rides with details and map view
Bookings management linked to passengers and rides

features.name: Global Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Responsive sidebar with drawer for mobile devices
user_interactions: Click hamburger menu on mobile to open drawer
Click navigation items to switch pages

features.name: SOS Monitoring
features.description: Monitor and resolve active SOS alerts
